query:
SELECT theme, DATE(createdAt) as dia, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids
FROM posts
GROUP BY theme, DATE(createdAt)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY dia DESC, total DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3F5sJN7FajWtXbb.root --database 3LYkMyiPgdB2gzxf44Hk3M --execute

FROM posts
GROUP BY theme, DATE(createdAt)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY dia DESC, total DESC
LIMIT 20;
